title: Confirm agent-task inbox roundtrip
prompt: Run: .\.augment\scripts\clone-agent-enqueue.ps1 -Prompt 'Reply with exactly: pong from CHost via airouter' -Kind roundtrip -Tag laptop-roundtrip -MaxTokens 256. Then close this task with: .\.augment\scripts\agent-task-complete.ps1 -Id <this-id> -Status complete -Summary 'Enqueued; CHost worker should pick it up within 10 min.'
